G.S.R. 930(E) .-In eXefC]SC of the powers con- ferred by sub-sectIon (1) read with cIau~e (c) of sub-sec ion (2) 0! Se·;\icn 3) o~ the Adllllllbtnll,vc Tribnnals Act, 1>185 _(13 of 1985), th? Central Government hereby makes the followmg rules, namely;- 1. Short title and commencement.-(l) These rules may be called the Andilr" Pradesh Administ:ative Tribunal (Salaric on,1 Allow"acos ""d CondItIOns of Service of Chaimtan, Vice-Chairman and Mem- beG) Rule;, 1989. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette, 2. Definitiom.-_In these rules, unless the context otherwise requic\!s:_ (a) "Act" means the Administrative Tribunols Act, Ut:; (13 cl 1985) (b) "Government" menns the Gove!nment of Andhra Pradesh; (c) "Tribunal" means the Andhra Pradesh Adminis!:"afi"Je Tribunal; (d) the words and exprcssiuns used in these rules and not defined, but ccfined in the Act shall have the meanings, respec:ively assigned to them in the Act. 3, Pay.-( I) The Chairman shall receive a pav of rupees eight thoU.~~~:1U plus a sp~cial pa} (Jf rUF~es five hundred per mens"In.
